description_long: This object is a stylized violin with a rectangular, blocky body and neck, reminiscent of a pixelated or voxel art style. The body is primarily brown with darker and lighter patches, simulating wood grain, and features two parallel white strings running from the tailpiece to the pegbox. A matching brown bow with a white section is positioned across the strings, suggesting readiness for play. The tailpiece and fingerboard are rendered in black, contrasting with the brown body. The scroll and pegbox are simplified, with the scroll lacking detailed carving. The overall design is minimalistic, omitting fine details such as f-holes and a chinrest, but the essential components of a violin and bow are clearly represented.
description: A blocky, stylized brown violin with a matching bow, featuring white strings and black fingerboard and tailpiece. The design is minimalistic, omitting fine details but clearly representing a violin.
description_view_0: The violin is seen from an angled top view, showing the body, neck, strings, and bow crossing the strings.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the length of the violin and bow, with the rectangular body and neck clearly visible.
description_view_2: A low, almost bottom-up view, emphasizing the flat underside of the violin and the bow's length.
description_view_3: A rear-side view showing the back of the violin and the bow, with the tailpiece and end of the neck visible.
